textByHash.1471a561c9ec74ee1fac80b5b7c19af60923515e: Talk to my secretary, I don't have time to deal with you.
textByHash.229448012c453fe5611336c5f37fdfc98296755c: My secretary will deal with any inquiries you have about the Purple Pewter.
textByHash.40a2cb5401e9443a4afb77b7218e39eb3abc6cfc: I told you to leave, human!
textByHash.5b0af2ce23dae504d63c6c93d1e3ca31acc19db3: How did you get in here? I don't have time to talk to you!
textByHash.7e9d37f30e386229f2bcdb6d343c2ad7b7741c79: I can't help you, go and see my secretary.
textByHash.8f8a85c1212444db7e5909824227c45141d0dcfe: Do you mind? You're blocking my view.
textByHash.9d39a5fab7254c803e9e8bbdf0e272f562b225b9: I'm too important to talk to the likes of you, leave.
textByHash.a8fb6b872d5b95b1a826c9b5a1a285e5f4ef78f9: If you're looking for the market, it's downstairs.
textByHash.b20c31794a1aa0fa15272122c8458919a6da071f: Today is not a good day, can you come back tomorrow?
textByHash.bbf7f2ddbe2955cf397f246485c4bd40aeb11ba2: Well then... instead of flipping a coin, why don't we let the human decide?
textByHash.f2363f1188f86032c6b5b54b93612c74c6e04e84: My secretary is sitting just over there, thank you.
